channel.title: welcome on Francisco Pereira
channel.description: Recent content in welcome on Francisco Pereira

item.title: Hello, World
item.description: A Warm Welcome Welcome to yet another personal blog page. Well, this one will follow the journey of a young engineer and data scientist who is about to graduate and will walk into the realms of industry. I will use this space to share my views and thoughts on pretty much anything I believe it’s worth putting up here. My idea is that this will be a space for personal growth, where I will be able to share my ideas with the world.
